title: Setup Grill content moves into the Setup Skill bundle; execution-grill-with-docs serves the Work Grill only
description: The Setup Skill (src/SKILL.md) delegates its Setup Grill context step to the stamped execution-grill-with-docs, whose rules are Work-Grill-specific — it feeds a PRD and forbids writing PHILOSOPHY.md — and both are wrong during setup, where Handoff follows and the philosophy layer legitimately writes PHILOSOPHY.md. Move the setup-interview content (context layer, philosophy sweep, team, one-off adherence agents) into the Setup Skill's own npm bundle: inline in src/SKILL.md if it stays within Precise Minimalism, else a bundled setup-grill reference beside principles.md (npm files manifest grows). The context layer references the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md by path — stamping (step 2) precedes the grill (step 3). The Setup Skill stops invoking execution-grill-with-docs; that skill stays purely the Work Grill's first step, unchanged. Explicit no-s from the 2026-06-12 Work Grill: no sentinel hook, no config.json rename, no migrate step, and no new stamped skill — the Setup Grill content rides in the to-execution package/plugin bundle, never stamped into Instances. Primary audience (Brooks, 2026-06-12): the fresh adopter arriving via npm — npm install to-execution, then telling the agent to read and follow node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md. Write the skill for that reader: no assumption of a skill registry, an installed personal skill, or prior framework context. Skill-registry and plugin invocations read the same file and lose nothing.
acceptance_criteria: src/SKILL.md's Setup Grill phase carries its own interview instructions and no longer invokes or references execution-grill-with-docs
SKILL.md works standalone for an agent reading it from node_modules/to-execution/ with no skill registry and no prior context — it plus its bundled references is the complete setup procedure
The setup context layer references the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md by explicit path
If a bundled reference file is added, the npm files manifest ships it (pack parity holds)
root_cause: The Setup Grill reused the Work Grill's first-step skill for its context layer, so one skill carried two conflicting rule sets selected by a caller it cannot see
fix: Setup Grill interview inlined into src/SKILL.md step 3 (build the glossary from scratch: sharpen terms, scenario-test boundaries, cross-reference code, write each term as it resolves, format per the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md path; ADRs sparingly per the stamped ADR-FORMAT.md path). Step 3 preamble distinguishes the Setup Grill from the Work Grill; step 1 reframes the stamped Lifecycle skills as the later Work Grill's and states setup runs from this file alone. Inline fit Precise Minimalism (SKILL.md 41→40 lines) so no bundled reference file was added — npm files manifest unchanged. src/template/.claude/skills/execution-grill-with-docs/ byte-unchanged.
notes: Resolved in the 2026-06-12 Work Grill (Brooks). Sentinel-hook + config.json variants were considered and descoped by the lead; ADR-0009 was drafted for the config rename and withdrawn with the descope.
